title: [MWC 2026] A Sound Immersion Experience With Galaxy Brings Calm to Barcelona
content: On March 4 in Barcelona, Samsung Electronics tuned out the noise of Mobile World Congress (MWC) 2026 with a half-day, multi-sensory Sound Immersion event. The Sound Immersion event is an immersive meditation experience designed to awaken the five senses with Galaxy wearables. The invited guests, including journalists and content creators, were offered a restorative pause through guided meditations inspired by the Spanish way of living — delivered via the immersive audio of Galaxy Buds4 Pro and enhanced by real-time wellness insights from Galaxy Watch8. ▲ W Barcelona, venue of the Sound Immersion event  ▲ The Galaxy S26 series, Galaxy Buds4 Pro and the Galaxy Watch8 series on display  Sound Immersion and Real-Time Wellness With Galaxy Buds4 Pro and Galaxy Watch8 Dr. Julie Smith — a clinical psychologist, author and content creator — led a multi-sensory experience demonstrating how sound shapes mood, focus and emotional connection within the Galaxy ecosystem. “The senses are more than tools for getting through everyday life — they are an abundant source of calm and clarity,” she said. During the Sound Immersion event we explored how gentle sensory input, combined with the latest cutting-edge technology, can help us feel more present in everyday life. Sound delivered through Galaxy Buds4 Pro, designed to create tailored, immersive sound experiences, can become a steady anchor for reset, balance and recovery.” ▲ Dr. Julie Smith leads a meditation session.  ▲ Participants wear Galaxy Buds4 Pro and Galaxy Watch8 while listening to meditation music.  Sound and Sight Session: Attendees took part in a meditation session focused on sight and sound, listening to immersive soundscapes through Galaxy Buds4 Pro’s rich Hi-Fi audio. As they slowly observed the Barcelona skyline and relaxed to the sounds of nature, they fully engaged their senses. The ergonomic blade design and deeper bass from a wider woofer supported relaxation and focus. Galaxy Watch8 tracked stress levels before and after the session to highlight the impact of visual and auditory stimulation on well-being. ▲ Participants take part in the Sound and Sight Session. ▲ Stress levels measured using Galaxy Watch8  Sound, Touch and Smell Session: Inspired by Barcelona’s beaches, citrus notes from a stone diffuser and the aroma of herbal tea filled the air alongside seashells and sand. Participants used enhanced adaptive Active Noise Cancelling (ANC) on Galaxy Buds4 Pro to reduce distractions and deepen focus. Throughout the session, Galaxy Watch8 monitored heart rate to provide real-time feedback on their level of calm. ▲ Participants take part in the Sound, Touch and Smell Session. ▲ Real-time heart rate monitored using Galaxy Watch8  Sound, Taste and Touch Session: Attendees savored antioxidant-rich Mediterranean cuisine while listening to calming music delivered through Galaxy Buds4 Pro focusing on the flavors, aromas and textures of each dish. Meanwhile, Galaxy Watch8’s Antioxidant Index measured skin carotenoids to provide insight into antioxidant levels. “Stepping away from the bustle of MWC with the Galaxy ecosystem and seeing the changes in my body made me realize how technology can effectively support rest in everyday life,” said an influencer who attended the event.  ▲ Participants take part in the Sound, Taste and Touch Session. ▲ Antioxidant Index measured using Galaxy Watch8  A Global Wellness Journey From New York to Barcelona The Barcelona event marked the latest stop in Samsung’s global wellness initiative. Since debuting at Galaxy Unpacked in New York last year, the series has expanded to the Vredestein 20km de Paris and Galaxy Unpacked 2026 in San Francisco, where a California-themed sound immersion led by sleep scientist Dr. Vanessa Hill offered moments of calm amid the launch-day bustle. ▲ Participants take photos after the event. By creating restorative pauses, the events illustrate how Galaxy innovations support well-being — even in crowded, noisy environments.

title: Galaxy Community Connect 2026: Global Communities Experience the Future of Galaxy
content: From February 24 to 26, Samsung Electronics hosted Galaxy Community Connect 2026 in San Francisco. Over 50 participants — including Samsung Members Stars and Reddit users from 17 countries — gathered to explore Samsung Galaxy’s vision, bringing and exchanging personal insights. The Samsung Members platform provides information on Samsung products and services while fostering a community for user interaction. Top contributors who consistently create high-quality content and actively engage with others are selected as Samsung Members Stars, helping strengthen connections between the brand and its community. More than a product showcase, the event emphasized community-driven dialogue and the exchange of perspectives — empowering participants to shape their own Galaxy experience. Galaxy Unpacked 2026: Unveiling the Next Era of Galaxy AI Galaxy Unpacked 2026 was the highlight of the three-day program. Samsung introduced a more integrated and personalized Galaxy AI, emphasizing a true agentic AI experience, along with enhanced privacy and security and new features of the Galaxy S26 series and the Galaxy Buds4 series. “It was incredible,” said Samsung Members Star Oksana Bykova (USA). “Samsung showcased Galaxy AI to expand everyday experiences, and Super Clear Call on the Galaxy Buds4 series was especially impressive.” “I’m excited about the Privacy Display on Galaxy S26 Ultra,” said Samsung Members Star Gerson Manzanares (Nicaragua). “The way the screen automatically adjusts viewing angles to block prying eyes is truly ingenious.” ▲ Participants attending Galaxy Unpacked 2026 ▲ A participant visiting the Galaxy Unpacked 2026 Experience Zone AMA Session: Going Behind the Scenes of Galaxy Camera Innovation The Ask Me Anything (AMA) session was one of the most popular programs. Sungdae Joshua Cho — Executive Vice President and Head of Visual Solution Team, Mobile eXperience (MX) Business at Samsung Electronics — took questions and responded in real time. The program included briefings and demonstrations of the Galaxy camera’s key technologies and features. Participants noted visible differences in brightness, noise and detail, highlighting how these advancements translate into meaningful user experiences. Going beyond a Q&A, the session became an open forum for direct dialogue between participants and Samsung. ▲ Cho presenting during the AMA session ▲ Participants listening to the AMA session Explore SF: Capturing the City Through Galaxy Another highlight was “Explore SF Your Way with Galaxy,” where participants explored the city using the Galaxy S26 series in their own ways. With AI Eraser, they effortlessly captured San Francisco’s scenic views, while Super Steady delivered clear, blur-free shots even on the move. Participants shared these moments with their communities, extending their experiences and insights to a wider audience. ▲ Participants creating content using the Galaxy S26 series Beyond the Event: Carrying the Momentum Forward Galaxy Community Connect 2026 centered on the Galaxy S26 series, offering participants opportunities to explore Galaxy AI throughout the event. In San Francisco, they reinterpreted and expanded the Galaxy experience in their own ways, fostering authentic connections. ▲ Participants enjoying the Gala Night on the final day of the event Samsung will continue strengthening direct engagement with its global communities, aiming to enrich the everyday lives of Galaxy users around the world.

title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Awarded ‘Best in Show’ at the Global Mobile Awards at Mobile World Congress 2026
content: Samsung Electronics today announced that Galaxy S26 Ultra won Best in Show at the Global Mobile Awards (GLOMO Awards) during Mobile World Congress (MWC) 2026 held in Barcelona, Spain. The Global Mobile Communications Association (GSMA) holds the GLOMO Awards annually during MWC to recognize outstanding innovations in the mobile industry. The Best in Show category celebrates consumer-focused products that set a benchmark for technology. One of the industry’s highest honors, Best in Show devices are known as the “gold standard” across the digital landscape as judged by more than 200 world-leading independent analysts, journalists and industry veterans. Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra: Best in Show At the March 4 awards ceremony, Galaxy S26 Ultra won Best in Show for its seamless blend of advanced hardware and intuitive, proactive One UI 8.5 software. Galaxy AI delivers adaptive, context-aware intelligence that simplifies everyday tasks while safeguarding security and privacy. Together, these advancements bring to life the most intuitive mobile AI designed to anticipate users’ needs.   Galaxy S26 Ultra also introduced the world’s first built-in Privacy Display, a breakthrough in display engineering, that gives users a more private but vibrant viewing experience. Inside, a customized chipset powers faster Galaxy AI, setting a new standard for effortless mobile experiences on Galaxy S26 Ultra. “This year’s competition was exceptionally strong,” said Shaun Collins, Chair of the Judges for MWC Best in Show 2026. “We look for technology that is not only innovative and compelling, but that genuinely moves the industry forward. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra stood out for pushing the boundaries of mobile technology while delivering meaningful, real-world impact. In particular, its privacy innovation addresses one of the most important needs of today’s digital lifestyle — security, personal space and trust.” The MWC Best in Show judging panel said that among more than 3,000 exhibitors, the Galaxy S26 Ultra stood out for making forward-looking innovation possible now. “While many technologies showcased at MWC highlight the future,” the panel said, “this is a product consumers can experience today.” “We are honored that the Galaxy S26 Ultra has been recognized as ‘Best in Show’ at this year’s GLOMO Awards,” said Stephanie Choi, EVP and Head of Mobile Marketing Center, Mobile eXperience (MX) Business at Samsung Electronics. “The Galaxy S26 Ultra is an agentic AI phone that signifies Samsung’s ongoing commitment to push our industry forward, and this distinction is especially meaningful given the extraordinary innovation showcased at MWC.” For more information about the Galaxy S26 Ultra, please visit: Samsungmobilepress.com and Samsung.com.

title: Formula 1® begins this weekend, exclusively on Apple TV in the U.S.
content: The 2026 FIA Formula One World Championship™ begins this weekend on Apple TV with the FORMULA 1 QATAR AIRWAYS AUSTRALIAN GRAND PRIX 2026.
